name: Two-Cylinder Interference
description: Two cylinders disturb each other's wakes, creating a more complex flow story than a single obstacle.

product.lesson_headline: Multiple bodies can synchronize, shield, or amplify wakes.
product.export_caption: Two-cylinder wake interference: interacting vortex streets.
classroom_prompts: Does the downstream cylinder sit in calmer or noisier flow?
How does spacing change the wake pattern?
